trigger.description: discoveryMode is set to allowlist but .ee/discovery_allowlist.toml is absent or has node_keys = []. SRR6.46.2 autodiscovery will probe zero peers; auto-enrollment will return auto_enrollment_no_eligible_peers on every run.
setup_commands: rm -f .ee/discovery_allowlist.toml   # or leave node_keys = [] in the file
